untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of market sentiment shift from 'rational valuation-based buying' to 'emotional/hysterical buying' and identification of 'extreme valuations (50%+ above rational value)'. These require fundamental valuation metrics and sentiment indicators not in the allowed indicator set. Additionally, the signal requires identifying Stage 1-4 cycle progression which requires multi-stage state tracking not supported by point-in-time technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to translate the reversal confirmation mechanics (new highs on declining volume, failed breakouts) as: entry on price at new highs (Donchian upper) with volume declining below 20-day average, and exit when price crosses below 20-day SMA on volume spike. However, the core signal logic about sentiment/valuation cycle stages cannot be expressed with available technical indicators alone. This requires regime classification or fundamental data inputs beyond the scope of this ruleset.
